spore.item.hurt: Too hurt to be of any use
spore.scanner.line.scamper: Time before the Mob will be overtaken
spore.scanner.organ.claw_fragment: The jagged remnants of an infected creature's natural weaponry. These splintered claws are infused with minerals scavenged from the host's body, giving them an unnatural resilience.
spore.scanner.organ.armor_fragment: Skin fragments hardened with layers of keratin and veined with invasive fungal growths, these fragments possess a unique blend of flexibility and durability.
spore.scanner.organ.mutated_heart: An enlarged strengthen heart, it has developed a membrane capable of producing new blood and stem cells. Seems to have grown a few more chambers.
spore.scanner.organ.mutated_fiber: A grotesque blend of muscle tissue intertwined with dense fungal hyphae, creating a material that is both unnaturally strong and flexible.
spore.scanner.organ.wing_membrane: A thin, leathery membrane torn off the wings of an aerial threat, it feels very rough to the touch. You can feel an innumerable amount of tiny veins running throughout the tissue.
spore.scanner.organ.cerebrum: The altered brain of an infected creature, its higher-thinking zones reduced to scarred tissue while in return it presents a high sensitive to electrical and magnetic fields.
spore.scanner.organ.alveolic_sack: A large lung like organ, filled with millions of contorted alveoli. These warped lungs seem to serve an alternative purpose, it can now diffuse noxious toxins from the host into the air.
spore.scanner.organ.altered_spleen: An abnormally enlarged organ from an infected creature, swollen with highly oxygenated blood, modified by the infection to maximize survival by flooding the system with adrenaline in an instant.
spore.scanner.organ.corrosive_sack: A gland of some sort secreting a very acidic substance that smells foul. It is possibly a recycled gastric gland from the digestive system. However, it is far too mutilated to properly identify its original form.
spore.scanner.organ.acidic_gland: A strange, new organ of no known origin. It produces a strong natural acid capable of eroding through pure steel. It still oozes...
spore.scanner.organ.amalgamated_heart: A massive, polychambered organ that seems to serve the same purpose as a heart; however, its size and functionality seems to have been expanded upon to a degree that has yet to be fully measured. It seems to be self- aware and sustaining, it still quivers.
spore.scanner.organ.ligaments: An interconnected network of hyphae and nerves operates the system of ligaments with a fine-tuned control despite the immense strength harbored by the ligaments and surrounding muscle.
spore.scanner.organ.fins: Massive semiaquatic fins severed off of a huge oceanic monstrosity. The membrane and bone structure offers unmatched flexibility and hydrodynamic movements.
spore.scanner.organ.hyperbolized_liver: The size of this liver has grown to a grotesque size, fusing with adjacent organs. Its original purpose to cleansing the host of noxious chemicals seems to have been reproposed into a means to collecting and storing such toxins. The gallbladder attached to the liver has swollen as well, producing bile to serve as a medium for these toxins to be utilized.
spore.scanner.organ.organoid_membrane: A thick membrane torn of the grotesque husk of an organoid, it presents cancerous levels of cellular regeneration
spore.item.desc.armads: Induces a rage in the wielder by giving them speed when they are below half health. Also has a 3x3 breaking area.
spore.item.desc.boomerang: Right clicking throws it like a boomerang, coming back to the thrower.
spore.item.desc.cleaver: Holding right click performs a spin attack.
spore.item.desc.shovel: Stuns enemies by applying slowness. Also has a 3x3 breaking area.
spore.item.desc.crossbow: Has very strong DPS when given Quick Charge.
spore.item.desc.bow: The bladed limbs of the bow can be used in close combat.
spore.item.desc.greatsword: Increases the armor of the wielder.
spore.item.desc.halbert: Best used when riding a mount, dealing more damage when the wielder rides another mob. Has very long reach.
spore.item.desc.knife: Can be thrown at enemies. Useful for harvesting more materials from mobs.
spore.item.desc.mace: Deals extreme knockback and pierces armor.
spore.item.desc.maul: Stuns enemies by applying weakness. Also has a 3x3 breaking area.
spore.item.desc.pickaxe: Right clicking a block will locate ores with a mycelic vein.
spore.item.desc.rapier: Delivers corrosive slashes and pierces armor.
spore.item.desc.saber: Right clicking causes the wielder to dash.
spore.item.desc.scythe: Its attack performs a large sweep that damages enemies.
spore.item.desc.shield: When blocking damage, the shield builds up to a large shockwave attack.
spore.item.desc.sickle: Can be thrown and used like a grappling hook. Pulls enemies towards the wielder when damaging them.
enchantment.spore.symbiotic_reconstituti: Strengthens the symbiotic bond between you and your gear, mending its wounds while under symbiosis.
enchantment.spore.cryogenic_aspect.desc: Chills the victim down to its core, slowing their movement speed and dealing freezing damage.
enchantment.spore.gastric_spewage.desc: The flesh possesses the properties of bile and its victim feels the effects of being showered with it.
enchantment.spore.corrosive_potency.desc: The flesh possesses the properties of corrosion and its victims will feel their melting touch.
enchantment.spore.unwavering_nature.desc: The flesh refuses to forget its origins of infecting its victims as well as the host.
enchantment.spore.mutagenic_reactant.des: The instability of the fungus seeks to aid its brother, not its host.
enchantment.spore.serrated_thorns.desc: Layers upon layers of corrosive and poisonous tipped thorns that protect its host.
enchantment.spore.voracious_maw.desc: A ravenous maw that consumes all that is flesh to heal the the weapon or armor it is grafted upon.
item.reagent.line2: it may also bestow side effects
item.line.shift: A nutrient soup made out of animal matter.
uneasy.message: You can't seem to fall asleep...
container.line.shift: The Biohazard Storage Unit is the perfect new addition to storing your organic materials.
